articles.title: Trump wants control of Kharg Island: Why Iran's tiny oil hub could become the next big flashpoint | Explained
articles.description: Kharg Island may be small, but it is the backbone of Iran's oil export network and a critical source of government revenue. Trump's latest remarks have thrust the strategic island into the spotlight.

articles.title: 'Total control of their oil and gas markets': Much like Venezuela, Trump sets sights on Iran's Kharg Island
articles.description: Former President Donald Trump issued fresh threats of military strikes against Iran, vowing to hit the country "very hard tonight" and seize control of its oil and gas facilities. The US carried out strikes targeting Iranian surveillance and air defense systems, with Trump warning of intensified bombing if Tehran did not accept American terms.

articles.description: Belagavi officials directed to report on Kannada groups' complaints regarding delay in recognizing Belagavi as part of Karnataka.

articles.description: US-Iran Conflict: President Donald Trump warns of heavy military strikes on Iran tonight but states he will spare civilian infrastructure.

articles.title: Ram Mandir Funds Issue Takes New Turn With Call For Investigation; Calls For Accountability Emerge
articles.description: A latest controversy has surfaced in Ayodhya, linked to the Shri Ram Mandir. Serious questions are being raised about transparency and financial accountability of temple donations. Allegations have been made regarding possible irregularities in funds collected from devotees across the country.The issue gained momentum after BJP functionary Rajneesh Singh wrote to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, demanding a detailed investigation into the donation process and financial management of the temple trust. In his letter, he called for a central agency probe to ensure that all funds have been properly accounted for and utilised.Responding to the controversy, Ram Mandir Trust General Secretary Champat Rai has denied any irregularities. He stated that all donations are being handled through proper procedures and that no concerns of wrongdoing have been brought to the trust’s notice.The PMO has asked for a detailed report today on June 11. This issue sits at a sensitive crossroads of religion, politics, and public accountability, making it a closely watched development across the country.

articles.title: TN CM Vijay proposes Class 12 marks based MBBS admissions, reiterates NEET opposition at NITI Aayog meeting
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay, at the Eleventh Governing Council Meeting of NITI Aayog, reiterated the State’s opposition to NEET for undergraduate medical admissions. The State proposed using Class XII marks as the sole criterion for filling State quota seats in MBBS, BDS and AYUSH courses. It said NEET affects rural and disadvantaged students. The State also outlined its youth-focused development vision, including skill missions, technology training and long-term economic growth targets.

articles.title: Beijing's trolls India over NEET: Gaokao didn't leak, but other exams in China did
articles.description: China's embassy in India highlighted the smooth conduct of its massive Gaokao exam, contrasting it with India's exam leak issues. While Gaokao faces fewer large-scale leaks, past incidents of cheating and alleged leaks in other Chinese exams, like the postgraduate entrance, have occurred. The Gaokao remains crucial for Chinese students' futures

articles.title: ‘One enemy is too many’: Indonesia President Prabowo hits back at criticism on frequent overseas trips
articles.description: President Prabowo Subianto has gone on more than 50 overseas trips to over 20 countries in less than two years in office, far more than his predecessors.

articles.title: Haryana guest teacher suspended days after joining Cockroach Janta Party protest in Delhi
articles.description: A guest teacher in Haryana's Rohtak district has been suspended after participating in a protest at Delhi's Jantar Mantar. Sulekha Dalal's suspension, effective June 8, followed a viral video of her addressing the Cockroach Janta Party rally. Dalal stated her participation was due to concerns over recruitment exam irregularities affecting her son.

articles.title: 74-year-old woman who chose singlehood for three decades shares 5 life lessons for young women
articles.description: A 74-year-old woman, Pamela Allyn, challenges societal norms by sharing her fulfilling 30-year single life. She emphasizes finding contentment outside of marriage, highlighting the importance of financial awareness, a strong support system, and prioritizing self-respect. Allyn's story offers a powerful perspective on independence and self-worth.

articles.title: I Will Be In Trouble If... Brij Bhushan Singh On Ram Temple Fund Embezzlement Row
articles.description: Brij Bhushan Singh's remarks come amid a raging row over alleged embezzlement of funds donated at the Ram temple in Ayodhya.

articles.description: Speaking to PTI, the Asansol Lok Sabha MP said he remains committed to serving the people who elected him and will continue to stand by Banerjee

articles.title: Rajasthan police rescue 15 girls, arrest 11 after busting child trafficking gang
articles.description: Police said the gang targeted poor, indebted families, primarily from the Kanjar community, and purchased girls by promising jobs

articles.title: ‘Not an era of war’: Jaishankar pushes for dialogue, diplomacy amid global conflicts
articles.description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar on Wednesday reiterated India’s long-held position that “this is not an era of war,” while stressing that dialogue and diplomacy remain the only way forward amid rising global conflicts and instability.

articles.title: ‘Totally baseless’: Cong rejects Mamata merger; accuses BJP of 'seat-chori' over TMC exodus
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Congress on Thursday termed the reports claiming any merger with the Mamata Banerjee-led TMC \"totally baseless\", putting an end to the buzz.

articles.title: ‘What’ll we feed children?’: Farmers oppose land acquisition for Shaktipeeth Expressway
articles.description: The six-lane Shaktipeeth Expressway is expected to pass through 13 districts, connecting 21 religious sites, including the major Shaktipeeths, and slash Nagpur-Goa travel time from 18 hours to 8 hours.

articles.title: Jaishankar in Bulgaria, discusses bilateral ties, India-EU partnership
articles.description: EAM S Jaishankar visited Bulgaria for talks on bilateral cooperation and India-EU ties. He noted India's 7-8% growth, offering new opportunities in engineering and defence, and invited Bulgaria to deepen connections in all sectors.

articles.title: Democracy 'brutally killed': Cong slams BJP over Natarajan's RS nom
articles.description: Congress leader Sukhdeo Bhagat attacked the BJP over the rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan's Rajya Sabha nomination from MP, calling it a "brutal killing" of democracy. Natarajan has now challenged the Returning Officer's decision in the Supreme Court.

articles.title: Virat Kohli refuses to pose as daughter Vamika waits for him: ‘Respect his privacy’
articles.description: In a recent video on Instagram, cricketer Virat Kohli refused to pose for paparazzi at the airport, because he wanted to meet his daughter Vamika.

articles.title: African proverb of the day: ''Now the marriage begins, ' says the woman who has been..." - Why real test begins after the honeymoon phase gets over
articles.description: This Swahili proverb reveals that true commitment is tested through life's hardships, showing how resilience and understanding strengthen relationships.

articles.title: Kharge jealous of PM Modi's longest tenure, claims Telangana BJP
articles.description: Telangana BJP spokesperson Prakash Reddy has slammed Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge, claiming he is 'jealous' of PM Modi's longest continuous tenure. Kharge had earlier accused the BJP of 'twisting history' to create a new category for Modi.

articles.title: PM Modi's Kisan-first approach hailed as foundation of Viksit Bharat
articles.description: Union Ministers Nitin Gadkari and Piyush Goyal hailed PM Modi's 'Kisan-first approach' on the NDA government's 12th anniversary. They praised farmer welfare schemes like e-NAM, PMFBY, and PM-KISAN as the foundation of Viksit Bharat 2047.

articles.title: Modi's 12-year tenure will be written in golden letters: Kiren Rijiju
articles.description: Union Minister Kiren Rijiju hailed PM Modi's 12-year tenure, stating the period's parliamentary reforms and landmark legislations will be 'written in golden letters'. He cited these achievements as historic steps towards building a 'Viksit Bharat'.

articles.title: Constitution in danger: Patwari on Natarajan's RS nomination row
articles.description: MP Congress President Jitu Patwari slammed the rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan's Rajya Sabha nomination, alleging political pressure. The party has moved the Supreme Court, while a legal expert has dismissed the move as a 'political stunt'.

articles.title: Dialogue, diplomacy only way forward, not an era of war: Jaishankar
articles.description: EAM S Jaishankar, in Bulgaria, reiterated India's stance that dialogue and diplomacy are the way forward in an era of conflict. He highlighted the need for supply chain resilience and unimpeded maritime trade, speaking for the Global South.

articles.title: Chirag Paswan, Samrat Choudhary wish Lalu Prasad Yadav on his birthday
articles.description: Union Minister Chirag Paswan and Bihar Deputy CM Samrat Choudhary were among leaders across party lines who wished RJD chief Lalu Prasad Yadav on his 78th birthday, praying for his long life and good health.

articles.title: NITI Aayog meeting: CMs Revanth Reddy, Naidu, Vijay arrive in Delhi
articles.description: CMs Revanth Reddy, Chandrababu Naidu and Vijay have arrived in Delhi for the 11th NITI Aayog meeting, chaired by PM Modi. Vijay also met President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi and other leaders. The meeting's theme is 'Inclusive Human Development'.

articles.title: PM Modi's tenure: Dilip Ghosh lauds PM, says Congress 'troubled'
articles.description: West Bengal Minister Dilip Ghosh lauded PM Modi's tenure, stating people are happy while the Congress is 'troubled'. The remark came after Congress's Mallikarjun Kharge criticised BJP's claims, accusing them of distorting history.

articles.title: Watch: US rains over 39 Tomahawk missiles in fiery 'self-defence' strikes on Iran
articles.description: The US Central Command released video of self-defense strikes against Iranian military targets, including radar and air defense sites. The operation, involving 39 Tomahawk missiles, was a response to Iran's alleged aggression threatening US forces and international shipping. This marks a significant escalation in regional tensions.

articles.title: US Israel Iran War News Live Updates: Iran claims missile strike targeted US F-35, F-16 jets at Jordan base
articles.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Today Live Updates: Iran’s IRGC claimed it launched a missile strike on a US-linked command centre in Jordan, targeting Al-Azraq Air Base with 12 ballistic missiles.

articles.description: Iran will consider any vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz as "collaborating with the enemy," the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy said in a statement.

articles.title: Iranian Envoy Says US Strikes Prove Military Force Cannot Deliver Lasting Security Or Stability
articles.description: Iran's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Amir Saeid Iravani, told the Security Council that lasting peace and stability in the Middle East require addressing the root causes of regional conflicts. He pointed to territorial occupations, Israeli military actions and the prolonged US military presence as key drivers of instability. Iravani also argued that recent US strikes against Iran showed foreign military deployments cannot guarantee security. The Iranian envoy urged Washington to abandon threats and intimidation and pursue diplomacy based on mutual respect, sovereign equality and international law.#Iran #UnitedNations #UNSC #MiddleEast #IranUN #AmirSaeidIravani #USIran #IsraelIran #Diplomacy #WorldNews #BreakingNews #Geopolitics #SecurityCouncil #MiddleEastConflict #InternationalRelations

articles.title: Trump’s Iran war strategy is making the IRGC stronger, not weaker
articles.description: A peace deal with the IRGC at the centre will mean a more security-centred Iranian economy
